ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  J. K. Cement Limited has announced its 32nd Annual General Meeting (AGM) for July 17, 2026, to be held virtually, and is ensuring all shareholders, including those without registered emails, have access to the FY2025-26 Integrated Annual Report and AGM notice online. A material impact for shareholders is the new requirement under the Income-Tax Act, 2025, for the company to deduct Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) on dividend payments, necessitating shareholders to update their PAN details. This document primarily serves as a routine regulatory compliance update with no immediate red flags regarding the company's financial health.
